texto: Do you use 'True Will' as an excuse to do nothing?Have you declared yourself enlightened?Damn your weak philosophies
autor: a pox and a pestilence your despicable sloth and arrogance.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de a pox and a pestilence your despicable sloth and arrogance. que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “Do you use 'True Will' as an excuse to do nothing?Have you declared yourself enlightened?Damn you…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, peter-j-carroll, excuse, com foco em reflexao.
